tasks.subject: Task 1: TvSection enum + TvShellViewModel + Koin registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the data model and ViewModel that power auth state and section routing.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvSection.kt`
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvShellViewModel.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt`
- Modify: `gradle/dependencies.gradle`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `TvSection` enum has six values: `ANIME, NEWS, BOOKMARKS, SCHEDULE, INFO, SETTINGS`
- [ ] `TvShellViewModel.user` initializes with the current user and updates whenever login state changes
- [ ] `TvShellViewModel.logout()` calls `api.user.logout().buildSingle()`
- [ ] `TvShellViewModel` registered in Koin `viewModelModule`
- [ ] `material-icons-extended` added to `gradle/dependencies.gradle`

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvSection.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvShellViewModel.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt", "gradle/dependencies.gradle"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TvSection enum has ANIME, NEWS, BOOKMARKS, SCHEDULE, INFO, SETTINGS", "TvShellViewModel.user is MutableLiveData<LocalUser?> initialized with storageHelper.user", "TvShellViewModel.logout() calls api.user.logout().buildSingle()", "TvShellViewModel registered in Koin viewModelModule", "material-icons-extended added to gradle/dependencies.gradle"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TvPlaceholderScreen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Provide a simple stub screen for sections that don't have TV implementations yet.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvPlaceholderScreen.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `TvPlaceholderScreen(sectionName: String)` fills screen with black background
- [ ] Shows sectionName centred at 28sp white text
- [ ] Shows 'Coming soon' subtitle at 16sp gray text below

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvPlaceholderScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TvPlaceholderScreen renders sectionName centred on black background", "Shows 'Coming soon' subtitle"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: TvNavigationDrawer content composable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the stateless drawer-content composable with profile header, nav items, and footer items.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvNavigationDrawer.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `TvNavigationDrawerContent` is a NavigationDrawerScope extension function
- [ ] Profile header toggles between Sign In (logged out) and user+Sign Out (logged in) states
- [ ] Six nav items with correct Icons.Default.* icons and animated labels
- [ ] Info and Settings pinned to bottom via Spacer(Modifier.weight(1f))
- [ ] Active section has selected=true

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvNavigationDrawer.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TvNavigationDrawerContent is NavigationDrawerScope extension", "Profile header toggles between Sign In and user+Sign Out states", "Six nav items with correct icons", "Info/Settings at bottom", "Active section selected=true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: TvAppShell + wire TvMainActivity + update TvBrowseScreen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Assemble the shell composable, update TvMainActivity to use it, remove onLoginClick from TvBrowseScreen.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvAppShell.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvMainActivity.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvBrowseScreen.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] TvAppShell wraps NavigationDrawer with section routing
- [ ] Sign In/Out wired correctly
- [ ] TvBrowseScreen has no onLoginClick param
- [ ] TvMainActivity uses TvAppShell
- [ ] assembleDebug succeeds

**Verify:** `./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon --max-workers 2` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvAppShell.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvMainActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvBrowseScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon --max-workers 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TvAppShell wraps NavigationDrawer with section routing", "Sign In/Out wired correctly", "TvBrowseScreen has no onLoginClick param", "TvMainActivity uses TvAppShell", "assembleDebug succeeds"]}
```
